Background:
Shin was one of Orochimaru's experimental test subjects and followers, and possessed a unique genetic make-up allowed the Sannin to perform and succeed in various genetic experiments, including cultivating permanent clones. Harvesting Shin's teeth and nerves ultimately allowed Orochimaru to uncover the many secrets of genetics.
At some point Shin became obsessed with the Uchiha Clan, especially Itachi Uchiha. As such, he began to imitate the Uchiha: adopting their surname and customary clothing, as well as numerous Sharingan which have been implanted all over his body. His Sharingan-embedded right arm was harvested by Orochimaru and transplanted to Danzō Shimura along with some of Hashirama Senju's cells. Some time after this, Shin left Orochimaru's side and took most of his clones with him.
Personality:
thumb|left|Shin sacrifices one of his clones to save himself.
Shin was a pragmatic, scientific-minded individual. Expanding on Orochimaru's desire for self-improvment, he triumphed scientific advancement and was a firm believer in survival of the fittest and natural selection. He believed living organisms were slaves to their genes and existed only to survive by passing on their strongest traits to the next generation. In addition, believing that might made right, viewing conflict as a necessary component of mankind's evolution, he sought to revive the Akatsuki as a means bring an end all peace in the world, which he believed would cause the human species to stagnate and ultimately become extinct. 
Likewise, though he referred to his clones as sons, he had no fatherly affection for them, instead viewing them as extensions of his own life who should be sacrificed for the sake of his continued survival. He demonstrated this lack of emotion by using one of his clones as a human shield, then harvested the clone's vital organs to surgically replace his own, killing the clone in the process. To which, he openly views emotional attachment was a meaningless shackle against progress. In battle, Shin had no sense of honour, using underhanded tactics to win as seen from taking advantage of Sasuke's fatherly instincts and attacking Sarada, prompting Sasuke to shield her with his body. 
Though typically detached and logical, he had an obsessive fascination with the Uchiha and its history, particularly towards Itachi. This stemmed from his obsession with evolution through conflict, coming to admire their natural aptitude and accelerated growth for battle. Because of this, he adopted the Uchiha surname as his own, going so far as to outfit himself and his clones in the clan's customary attire. He had come to loathe Sasuke Uchiha, blaming him for the death of Itachi and bringing shame to the Uchiha clan, wishing to "avenge" Itachi by killing Sasuke. To which, he was very hypocritical and delusional, completely disregarded all of Itachi's own crimes against the Uchiha, rather believing that Itachi's actions were all justified and wished to "continue" Itachi's work. However, as noted by Sasuke, Shin in fact understood nothing about Itachi, who actually was a compassionate man valued peace above all else to the point of sacrificing himself for it.
Arrogantly believing himself superior to his enemies, he tends to overestimate his control of situations.
Abilities:
Shin was a highly capable ninja, able to compete against the likes of a limited Sasuke Uchiha and Naruto Uzumaki. He was a talented strategist and tactician, able to plan well-ahead and adjust to the change in situations. Likewise, during his battle against Sakura Uchiha, while still recovering from his previous injuries, he was able to pressure her and seemingly would have defeated her had Sasuke not intervened.
[Physical Prowess] Shin possessed a unique genetic make-up that would completely accept any new genetic material, be it tissue, organs or entire limbs, without a chance of rejection, allowing him to fully integrate it into his being. Doing so also allowed Shin to make use of any genetic modification at its full potential. According to Orochimaru, it was this very trait that made it much easier for permanent and separate entity clones of him to be created. 
Shin had great endurance, able to survive the damage from one of Sakura Uchiha's punches long enough to be treated with surgery, which he performed himself while casually talking to the captured Sakura. Even more, after said surgery, he was quickly able to engage Sakura in combat with no apparent debilitation. He also apparently had a large reserve of chakra, as despite his various Sharingan appearing to be active constantly, he showed no signs of exhaustion or physical strain, even with regular and constant use of his Mangekyō Sharingan techniques.
In the anime, he proved to be very agile and coordinated, able to manoeuvre through the battlefield with easy. He was also adept in taijutsu with considerable strength, able to plough through stone and overwhelm Sakura despite her own adept fighting skills and destructively powerful attacks.
[Sharingan] thumb|left|Shin's primary Sharingan.
Shin possessed multiple fully-matured Sharingan implanted about his body. Because of his highly-adaptive body, Shin could maintain his Sharingan for as long as he pleased unhindered unlike most people not of Uchiha blood. With these eyes, he had heightened perception and was able to perform various complicated attack patterns. He also owned a mysterious creature with a Sharingan, was able to share vision with it and others, and could use his dōjutsu techniques through it as a medium.
{{-L}}
Also with his right eye, Shin was capable of using space–time ninjutsu, with which he could create a barrier that instantaneously teleported himself and anything else within it to a location.
